title: The Bridal Party in Hardanger
actors: Aase Bye, Gunhild Schytte-Jacobsen, Henry Gleditsch
plot: Based on the novel "Marit Skjølte" by Kristofer Janson, this Norwegian silent movie tells the story of young Marit and her love, Anders, who travels to America to seek his fortune. Without Marit's knowledge, he returns to marry a ...
